title: Students
description: Manage enrolled students, track academic status, and handle admissions.
accessDenied: You don't have permission to view students.

new.title: Add Student
new.description: Create a new student record with initial enrollment.

fieldDescriptions.phoneFormat: 10-digit Indian mobile, stored without country code
fieldDescriptions.isRteAdmitted: Tick if the student was admitted under the Right to Education Act 25% EWS/DG quota.

fieldHelp.academicYearBody: The Indian school session that runs April through March (e.g. 2025–26 covers April 2025 to March 2026). The student is admitted into this session, their class and section lists are filtered by it, and promotion to the next year will create a fresh record.
fieldHelp.academicYearExample: If you admit a student in June 2025, select 2025–26. For admissions happening in March 2026 for the upcoming term, select 2026–27.
fieldHelp.socialCategoryBody: The government-defined classification used for reservation quotas, RTE reporting, and state scholarship eligibility. This is never shown to teachers or other students and is masked in exports unless you have audit-admin permissions.
fieldHelp.socialCategoryOptions: General — no reservation category. OBC — Other Backward Class. SC — Scheduled Caste. ST — Scheduled Tribe. EWS — Economically Weaker Section (family income below the state EWS ceiling, typically ₹8 lakh/year).
fieldHelp.admissionTypeBody: How this student entered your institute. This drives UDISE+ reporting, fee-waiver rules, and TC history, so pick the option that matches the actual admission route.
fieldHelp.admissionTypeNew: New — first-time admission at any class. Most students in pre-primary and Class 1.
fieldHelp.admissionTypeLateral: Lateral entry — mid-session admission from another institute, usually because the family relocated.
fieldHelp.admissionTypeReadmission: Re-admission — a previously withdrawn or dropped-out student returning.
fieldHelp.admissionTypeTransfer: Transfer — joined via a Transfer Certificate from another institute at the start of a session.

errors.firstNameRequired: Please enter the student's first name
errors.lastNameRequired: Please enter the student's last name
errors.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid 10-digit Indian mobile number

filters.search: Search by name or admission number…
filters.statusesSelected: {count, plural, one {# status} other {# statuses}} selected

empty.noDataDescription: Enrolled students will appear here once admissions are processed.
empty.noMatchDescription: Try adjusting the search or filter values.

bulk.selectAllOnPage: Select all students on this page
bulk.selected: {count, plural, one {# student selected} other {# students selected}}
bulk.dialogDescription: Move {count, plural, one {# student} other {# students}} to a different section in the same standard.
bulk.differentStandards: Selected students are in different standards. Bulk section change only works when every student belongs to the same standard.
bulk.missingAcademicRecord: {count, plural, one {# student does not} other {# students do not}} have a current-year academic record. Admit them to the active year first.
bulk.overrideReasonHelp: Required only when the target section is at or above its hard capacity limit.
bulk.changeSuccess: Moved {count, plural, one {# student} other {# students}} to the new section
bulk.changePartial: Moved {succeeded} students; {failed} failed. Check details and try again.

detail.notFoundDescription: This student may have been deleted or never existed.
detail.tabErrorDescription: Something went wrong rendering this section. You can retry without leaving the page.

profile.title: Personal & regulatory information
profile.casteHelp: Caste is collected solely for UDISE+ DCF and government scholarship eligibility. It is never displayed to teachers or other students and is masked in exports unless you have audit-admin permissions.
profile.motherTongueHelp: The language most commonly spoken at home. UDISE+ uses this field to plan multilingual education under NEP 2020.
profile.socialCategoryHelp: General/OBC/SC/ST/EWS classification used for reservation reporting, RTE quota tracking, and state scholarship disbursement.
profile.rteAdmittedHelp: Mark yes if this student was admitted under the 25% RTE quota. This affects fee waivers, scholarship eligibility, and the annual UDISE+ RTE report.
profile.concurrencyError: Someone else modified this student. Refresh and try again.
profile.draftFoundDescription: You have unsaved changes from a previous session. Restore them or discard?

status.label: Status
status.confirmDescription: Changing status to {status} is a destructive operation. Please provide a reason (at least 10 characters).
status.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this status change is happening…
status.reasonTooShort: Reason must be at least 10 characters.

academics.title: Year-by-year history
academics.emptyDescription: Once the student is enrolled in an academic year, that year will appear here.

guardians.title: Linked guardians
guardians.emptyDescription: Link a parent or guardian from the Guardians directory.
guardians.linkDialogDescription: Select an existing guardian to link to this student.
guardians.unlinkConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to unlink this guardian from the student?
guardians.count: {count, plural, one {# linked guardian} other {# linked guardians}}

linkDialog.title: Link a guardian
linkDialog.description: Attach an existing guardian to this student and record the relationship.
linkDialog.primaryWarning: Another guardian is already the primary contact. Linking this guardian as primary will replace the existing one.

documents.title: Uploaded documents
documents.emptyDescription: Birth certificates, transfer certificates, and other scans will appear here.

upload.dialogDescription: Record an uploaded document against this student's file.
upload.fileUrlsHelp: Paste the file URLs from MinIO (one per line). Direct browser upload coming soon.

tc.emptyDescription: Transfer certificates issued for this student will appear here.

audit.emptyDescription: Edits and lifecycle events for this student will be recorded here.
